action_set_definitions.name: get_market_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the market, including inventory levels, current prices, competitor prices, and demand indices for specified products.

product_ids.description: The list of product unique identifiers to fetch data for.

action_set_definitions.name: simulate_performance
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates the potential revenue and margin outcomes based on a proposed set of prices before committing to them.

proposed_prices.description: A mapping of product IDs to their proposed new unit prices.

action_set_definitions.name: update_pricing
action_set_definitions.description: Commits the new prices for the specified items to the environment.

price_updates.description: A mapping of product IDs to the final prices to be set.

state_description.inventory_levels: Mapping of product IDs to their current stock count.
state_description.current_prices: The current unit price set for each product.
state_description.competitor_prices: The observed prices of similar products from competitors.
state_description.market_demand_index: A multiplier representing overall market interest (1.0 is baseline).
state_description.step_count: The current time step or day in the simulation.
